name: <NAME>
description: <A paragraph or two of prose: who this character is, their role, background, and what they're like to interact with. Write it the way you'd describe a person, not a spec sheet. This is the foundation the model builds on.>
voice: <how they talk, one trait per line, e.g. 'warm and concise'>
principles: <optional: how this character actually works, e.g. 'verifies before answering'>
<remove this whole array if you don't need it>
avoid: <optional: exact phrases this character never uses>

examples.user: <a realistic thing a user might say>
examples.assistant: <how this character would reply, in their exact voice. these few-shot examples are the single most important field, write 3-5 that really sound like the character>

examples.user: <another user message, ideally a different situation>
